tools.name: accounts.deleteV2AccountsIdJson
tools.description:
Deletes an account. This operation is not reversible without contacting support.
This operation can be called multiple times successfully.

Deleting an account will remove all connected people from that account.

tools.name: accounts.getV2AccountsIdJson
tools.description: Fetches an account, by ID only.

tools.name: accounts.getV2AccountsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple account records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: accounts.postV2AccountsJson
tools.description:
Creates an account.

"domain" must be unique on the current team.

tools.name: accounts.putV2AccountsIdJson
tools.description:
Updates an account.

"domain" must be unique on the current team.

tools.name: accountStages.getV2AccountStagesIdJson
tools.description: Fetches an account stage, by ID only.

tools.name: accountStages.getV2AccountStagesJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple account stage records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: accountTiers.getV2AccountTiersIdJson
tools.description: Fetches an account tier, by ID only.

tools.name: accountTiers.getV2AccountTiersJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple account tier records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: accountUpsert.postV2AccountUpsertsJson
tools.description:
Upserts an account record. The upsert_key dictates how the upsert will be performed. The create and update behavior
is exactly the same as the individual create and update endpoints.

tools.name: actionDetailsCallInstructions.getV2ActionDetailsCallInstructionsIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a call instruction, by ID only.

tools.name: actionDetailsCallInstructions.getV2ActionDetailsCallInstructionsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple call instruction records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: actions.getV2ActionsIdJson
tools.description:
Fetches an action, by ID only.
This endpoint will only return actions that are in_progress or pending_activity.
Once an action is complete, the request for that action will return a 404 status code.

tools.name: actions.getV2ActionsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple action records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters. Only actions that are currently "in_progess" will be returned by
this endpoint.

If the requester is not an admin, this endpoint will only return actions belonging to the requester.
If the request is an admin, this endpoint will return actions for the entire team. Additionaly, an admin
may use the user_guid parameter to request actions that belong to specific users on the team.

tools.name: activities.postV2ActivitiesJson
tools.description:
Creates an activity. An activity will mark the associated action as completed. Currently,
only certain action types can have an activity explicitly created for them.

tools.name: activityHistories.getV2ActivityHistories
tools.description: Fetches all of the customer's past activities for your application. Returns all the Activities that are found on the Salesloft Activity Feed. Visit here for more details.

tools.name: bulkJobs.getV2BulkJobs
tools.description: Fetches multiple bulk job records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to the respective parameters.

tools.name: bulkJobs.getV2BulkJobsId
tools.description: Fetches a bulk job, by ID only.

tools.name: bulkJobs.postV2BulkJobs
tools.description: Creates a bulk job. The type of the bulk job must be included when created. For additional information on creating bulk jobs, the types of supported bulk jobs, and examples of the bulk job flow, visit the bulk job details page.

tools.name: bulkJobs.putV2BulkJobsId
tools.description: Updates a bulk job's name and / or marks a bulk job as 'ready_to_execute'. May only be updated if the bulk job is still in an "open" state. For additional information on creating bulk jobs, the types of supported bulk jobs, and examples of the bulk job flow, visit the bulk job details page.

tools.name: bulkJobsJobData.getV2BulkJobsBulkJobsIdJobData
tools.description: Fetches multiple job data records for a given bulk job. Pagination is not supported, but cursor based polling is via use of the `id[gt]` filter. Pass the last id seen (i.e. `id[gt]=1234`) in order to get the next batch of records.

tools.name: bulkJobsJobData.postV2BulkJobsBulkJobsIdJobData
tools.description: Upload job data for the specified bulk job. Upload an array of objects, where element contains the parameters necessary to execute the individual calls. Each call to this endpoint can handle up to 5,000 records at a time. There is no limit to how many times you can create job data for a given bulk job. For additional information on creating bulk jobs, the types of supported bulk jobs, and examples of the bulk job flow, visit the bulk job details page.

tools.name: bulkJobsResults.getV2BulkJobsBulkJobsIdResults
tools.description: Fetches multiple job data records for a completed bulk job. Note that until a bulk job's state is set to `done` the returned `data` will be an empty array. Pagination is not supported, but cursor based polling is via use of the `id[gt]` filter. Pass the last id seen (i.e. `id[gt]=1234`) in order to get the next batch of records.

tools.name: cadenceExports.getV2CadenceExportsIdJson
tools.description: Exports a cadence as JSON.

tools.name: cadenceImports.postV2CadenceImportsJson
tools.description: New cadences can be created or steps can be imported onto existing cadences which do not have steps. Visit here for more details.

tools.name: cadenceMemberships.deleteV2CadenceMembershipsIdJson
tools.description: Cadence Membership

tools.name: cadenceMemberships.getV2CadenceMembershipsIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a cadence membership, by ID only.

tools.name: cadenceMemberships.getV2CadenceMembershipsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple cadence membership records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters. A cadence membership is the association between a person and their current and
historical time on a cadence. Cadence membership records are mutable and change over time. If a person is
added to a cadence and re-added to the same cadence in the future, there is a single membership record.

tools.name: cadenceMemberships.postV2CadenceMembershipsJson
tools.description:
Adds a person to a cadence. person_id and cadence_id are required, and must be visible to the authenticated user. user_id will
default to the authenticated user, but can be set to any visible user on the authenticated team.

A person cannot be added to a cadence on behalf of a teammate unless the cadence is a team cadence, the cadence is owned by
the teammate, or the teammate has the Personal Cadence Admin permission.

tools.name: cadences.getV2CadencesIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a cadence, by ID only.

tools.name: cadences.getV2CadencesJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple cadence records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: calendarEvents.getV2CalendarEvents
tools.description: Returns all calendar events, paginated and filtered by the date.

tools.name: calendarEvents.postV2CalendarEventsUpsert
tools.description:
Upserts a calendar event object.
  Upsert key is a combination of `id` and `i_cal_uid` scoped to the given `calendar_id`.
  Bulk operations:
  This endpoint is used for bulk operations, see https://developers.salesloft.com/bulk.html for integration instructions.
  Use `calendar/events/upsert` as an event type, and this spec as a data spec.
  This endpoint should be used directly for the time sensitive calendar event updates.

tools.name: callDataRecords.getV2CallDataRecordsIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a call data record, by ID only.

tools.name: callDataRecords.getV2CallDataRecordsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple call data records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

Call data records are records of all inbound and outbound calls through Salesloft. A call data record may
be associated with a call, but does not have to be.

tools.name: callDispositions.getV2CallDispositionsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple call disposition records. The records can be sorted according to
the respective parameters. Call dispositions must be configured in application. This will
change in the future, but please contact us if you have a pressing use case.

tools.name: callerIDs.getV2PhoneNumbersCallerIdsJson
tools.description:
Each entry is a possible caller ID match for the number. Multiple
entries may be returned if the phone number is present on more than one
person in the system.  Phone number should be in E.164 format.

tools.name: calls.getV2ActivitiesCallsIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a call, by ID only.

tools.name: calls.getV2ActivitiesCallsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple call records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: calls.postV2ActivitiesCallsJson
tools.description:
Creates a call. The parameters of this endpoint can be used to create an action
and ensure that the CRM Task is mapped correctly.

tools.name: callSentiments.getV2CallSentimentsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple call sentiment records. The records can be sorted according to
the respective parameters. Call sentiments must be configured in application. This will
change in the future, but please contact us if you have a pressing use case.

tools.name: conversationsCalls.postV2ConversationsCalls
tools.description: Enqueue a Conversations Call for processing

tools.name: crmActivities.getV2CrmActivitiesIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a crm activity, by ID only.

tools.name: crmActivities.getV2CrmActivitiesJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple crm activity records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: crmActivityFields.getV2CrmActivityFieldsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple crm activity field records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: crmUsers.getV2CrmUsersJson
tools.description: Crm Users

tools.name: customFields.deleteV2CustomFieldsIdJson
tools.description: Deletes a custom field.

tools.name: customFields.getV2CustomFieldsIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a custom field, by ID only.

tools.name: customFields.getV2CustomFieldsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple custom field records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: customFields.postV2CustomFieldsJson
tools.description: Creates a custom field.

tools.name: customFields.putV2CustomFieldsIdJson
tools.description: Update a custom field.

tools.name: emails.getV2ActivitiesEmailsIdJson
tools.description: Fetches an email, by ID only.

tools.name: emails.getV2ActivitiesEmailsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple email records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: emailTemplateAttachments.getV2EmailTemplateAttachmentsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple email template attachment records. The records can be filtered and paged according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: emailTemplates.getV2EmailTemplatesIdJson
tools.description: Fetches an email template, by ID only.

tools.name: emailTemplates.getV2EmailTemplatesJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple email template records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: externalEmails.postV2ExternalEmailsJson
tools.description: Creates an external email object.

tools.name: groups.getV2GroupsIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a group, by ID only.

tools.name: groups.getV2GroupsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple group records. The records can be filtered, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: imports.deleteV2ImportsIdJson
tools.description:
Deletes an import, by ID only. The associated people can be deleted as part of the deletion process.

Admin users can access imports for the entire team, but non-admin users can only access their own imports.

tools.name: imports.getV2ImportsIdJson
tools.description:
Fetches an import, by ID only.

Admin users can access imports for the entire team, but non-admin users can only access their own imports.

tools.name: imports.getV2ImportsJson
tools.description: Fetches multiple imports.

tools.name: imports.postV2ImportsJson
tools.description: Creates an import.

tools.name: imports.putV2ImportsIdJson
tools.description:
Updates an import, by ID only.

Admin users can access imports for the entire team, but non-admin users can only access their own imports.

tools.name: liveFeedItems.postV2ThirdPartyLiveFeedItems
tools.description: Creates a live feed item that can be sent to users. May only be used by whitelisted Frontend Integrations. Reference the Salesloft App Directory and Frontend Integrations sections for additional details.

tools.name: liveWebsiteTrackingParameters.postV2LiveWebsiteTrackingParametersJson
tools.description: Creates a Live Website Tracking parameter to identify a person

tools.name: me.getV2MeJson
tools.description:
Authenticated user information. This endpoint does not accept any parameters as it is
represents your authenticated user. The "Users" resource provides user information
for other users on the team.

tools.name: meetings.getV2MeetingsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple meeting records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to the respective parameters.
Meetings resource is responsible for events created via the Salesloft platform using calendaring features.
These events can relate to cadences, people, and accounts.

tools.name: meetings.putV2MeetingsIdJson
tools.description: Updates a meeting, by ID only.

tools.name: meetingSettings.putV2MeetingsSettingsIdJson
tools.description: Updates a meeting setting, by ID only.

tools.name: meetingsSettingsSearches.postV2MeetingsSettingsSearchesJson
tools.description: Fetches multiple meeting setting records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to the respective parameters.

tools.name: mimeEmailPayloads.getV2MimeEmailPayloadsIdJson
tools.description: Fetch the MIME content for email.

tools.name: notes.deleteV2NotesIdJson
tools.description:
Deletes a note owned by authorized account.
This operation is not reversible without contacting support.
This operation can be called multiple times successfully.

tools.name: notes.getV2NotesIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a note, by ID only.

tools.name: notes.getV2NotesJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple note records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: notes.postV2NotesJson
tools.description: Creates a note.

tools.name: notes.putV2NotesIdJson
tools.description: Updates a note. Any changes to the note or associated records will not reflect in your CRM.

tools.name: ongoingActions.postV2OngoingActionsJson
tools.description:
Creates an ongoing action. An ongoing action is an action that is not yet completed,
but progress has been made towards the completion. The user should not need to do
anything for an ongoing action to be completed. An ongoing action can be later completed
by creating an activity.

Ongoing actions are marked as status=pending_activity.

tools.name: pendingEmails.getV2PendingEmailsJson
tools.description: Fetches a list of emails ready to be sent by an external email service.

tools.name: pendingEmails.putV2PendingEmailsIdJson
tools.description: Updates the status of an email sent by an External Email Client. Does not affect lofted emails.

tools.name: people.deleteV2PeopleIdJson
tools.description:
Deletes a person. This operation is not reversible without contacting support.
This operation can be called multiple times successfully.

tools.name: people.getV2PeopleIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a person, by ID only.

tools.name: people.getV2PeopleJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple person records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: people.postV2PeopleJson
tools.description:
Creates a person. Either email_address or phone/last_name must be provided as a unique lookup
on the team.

tools.name: people.putV2PeopleIdJson
tools.description: Updates a person.

tools.name: personStages.deleteV2PersonStagesIdJson
tools.description:
Deletes a person stage. This operation is not reversible without contacting support.
This operation can be called multiple times successfully.

tools.name: personStages.getV2PersonStagesIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a person stage, by ID only.

tools.name: personStages.getV2PersonStagesJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple person stage records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: personStages.postV2PersonStagesJson
tools.description: Creates a person stage.

tools.name: personStages.putV2PersonStagesIdJson
tools.description: Updates a person stage.

tools.name: personUpsert.postV2PersonUpsertsJson
tools.description:
Upserts a person record. The upsert_key dictates how the upsert will be performed. The create and update behavior
is exactly the same as the individual create and update endpoints.

tools.name: phoneNumberAssignments.getV2PhoneNumberAssignmentsIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a phone number assignment, by ID only.

tools.name: phoneNumberAssignments.getV2PhoneNumberAssignmentsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple phone number assignment records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: recordingSettings.getV2PhoneNumbersRecordingSettingsIdJson
tools.description:
Fetches the recording status for a given phone number, based on Do Not Record and Recording Governance for your team.
Phone number should be in E.164 format.

tools.name: savedListViews.deleteV2SavedListViewsIdJson
tools.description:
Deletes a saved list view. This operation is not reversible without contacting support.
This operation can be called multiple times successfully.

tools.name: savedListViews.getV2SavedListViewsIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a saved list view, by ID only.

tools.name: savedListViews.getV2SavedListViewsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple saved list view records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: savedListViews.postV2SavedListViewsJson
tools.description: Creates a saved list view.

tools.name: savedListViews.putV2SavedListViewsIdJson
tools.description: Updates a saved list view.

tools.name: steps.getV2StepsIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a step, by ID only.

tools.name: steps.getV2StepsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple step records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: successes.getV2SuccessesJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple success records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: tags.getV2TagsJson
tools.description:
Fetches a list of the tags used for a team. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

Tags can be applied to mulitple resource types.

tools.name: tasks.getV2TasksIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a task, by ID only.

tools.name: tasks.getV2TasksJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple task records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: tasks.postV2TasksJson
tools.description: Creates a task.

tools.name: tasks.putV2TasksIdJson
tools.description: Updates a task.

tools.name: team.getV2TeamJson
tools.description: Fetches the team of the authenticated user.

tools.name: teamTemplateAttachments.getV2TeamTemplateAttachmentsJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple team template attachment records. The records can be filtered and paged according to
the respective parameters.

tools.name: teamTemplates.getV2TeamTemplatesIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a team template, by ID only.

tools.name: teamTemplates.getV2TeamTemplatesJson
tools.description:
Fetches multiple team template records. The records can be filtered, paged, and sorted according to
the respective parameters.

Team templates are templates that are available team-wide. Admins may use
team templates to create original content for the entire team, monitor version control to ensure templates are always up to date,
and track template performance across the entire organization. All metrics on a team template reflect usage across the team; individual metrics can be found with the email_templates API endpoint.

tools.name: users.getV2UsersIdJson
tools.description: Fetches a user, by ID only.

tools.name: users.getV2UsersJson
tools.description:
Non Admin: Lists only your user, or all on team depending on group visibility policy
Team Admin: Lists users associated with your team

tools.name: webhookSubscriptions.deleteV2WebhookSubscriptionsId
tools.description: Deletes a webhook subscription. This operation is not reversible without contacting support. This operation can be called multiple times successfully.

tools.name: webhookSubscriptions.getV2WebhookSubscriptions
tools.description: Fetches all of the customer's webhook subscriptions for your application.

tools.name: webhookSubscriptions.getV2WebhookSubscriptionsId
tools.description: Fetches a webhook subscription, by ID only.

tools.name: webhookSubscriptions.postV2WebhookSubscriptions
tools.description: Creates a webhook subscription. Visit the webhooks page for additional details and a list of available webhooks. Request must be made with a valid Oauth token or API key.

tools.name: webhookSubscriptions.putV2WebhookSubscriptionsId
tools.description:
Updates a webhook subscription.
Request must be made with a valid Oauth token or API key.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
